mainEntity.name: What if My Employer Didn't Provide Safety Gear for Hazardous Chemicals?
mainEntity.text: What if My Employer Didn't Provide Safety Gear for Hazardous Chemicals?

acceptedAnswer.text: If your job didn't give you gloves or masks, they've put you at risk. Lack of safety gear is a major red flag that helps prove your employer's liability for your condition. Whether it's a sudden burn or a slow-acting rash, you shouldn't pay for their negligence. Contact Just Work Comp Law today to ensure the insurance company doesn't ignore your chemical exposure claim.
